title: cordia torrei
intro: Cordia torrei, also known as the Golden Trumpet, is a tropical flowering plant native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant's extracts and oils have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues. Cordia torrei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, and its flowers can also be used as a natural dye.
